news.headline: Senators question Pfizer's Direct-To-Consumer model, sent letter to UpScriptHealth CEO. Introduced PfizerForAll in August 2024.
news.summary: In August 2024, Pfizer Inc (NYSE:PFE) launched the PfizerForAll digital platform in partnership with UpScriptHealth, Alto Pharmacy, and Instacart. In a letter to UpScriptHealth CEO Peter Ax, four senators - Richard Durbin, Elizabeth Warren, Peter Welch, and Bernie Sanders - expressed concerns about the financial ties between Pfizer and UpScriptHealth regarding possible violations of the federal Anti-Kickback Statute (AKS). The senators questioned the PfizerForAll program's funding by Pfizer and its potential impact on steering patients towards specific drugs. This story is available on Benzinga.com and was updated to include the senators asking UpScriptHealth to respond.

news.headline: Veritone appoints Francisco J. Morales to Board of Directors effective 3/20/2025. Morales is Co-founder of 5.11 Tactical. Founded in 2003, 5.11 Tactical is a global market leader in tactical apparel for law enforcement, military, and first responders.
news.summary: Veritone, Inc., a leading provider of human-centered enterprise AI solutions traded on NASDAQ under VERI, has recently revealed the addition of Francisco J. Morales to its Board of Directors. This appointment will officially take effect on March 20, 2025. Morales, the Co-founder and Executive Chairman of 5.11 Tactical, which he established in 2003, joins the board bringing his extensive experience as the former CEO of the renowned company. 5.11 Tactical is a global industry frontrunner in producing tactical apparel, footwear, and gear tailored for law enforcement, military personnel, and first responders.

news.headline: Trump requests Supreme Court to step in on Birthright Citizenship issue.
$1.8M campaign by Hunter Nation aims to elect Brad Schimel to Wisconsin Supreme Court with help of Trump Jr., Nugent, Favre.
news.summary: Donald Trump Jr., Ted Nugent, Brett Favre, and various other celebrities and influencers are part of a campaign promoting voting for Judge Schimel on April 1st. This initiative, spearheaded by Hunter Nation, Inc., aims to target hunters and 2nd Amendment activists through multi-medium ads. The ads will feature these prominent figures urging the audience to support the cause. This campaign, set to launch on March 13, 2025, in MISSION, Kan., marks a significant effort to mobilize voters, with the goal of influencing the upcoming election.

news.headline: CoolIT introduces 4000W DLC coldplate, setting new liquid cooling tech standard with doubled previous limits.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on March 13, 2025, CoolIT Systems, known for its liquid cooling solutions for AI and high-performance computing, has unveiled a groundbreaking single-phase direct liquid cooling coldplate capable of handling up to 4000W. This new technology surpasses the previous standards and marks a significant advancement in cooling capabilities.

news.headline: DocuSign beats Q4 revenue with $776.3 million, EPS at 86 cents, billings up 11% to $923.2 million. Shares rise despite soft guidance.
news.summary: DocuSign Inc (NASDAQ:DOCU) released its fourth-quarter financial results following the market close on Thursday. The company reported a revenue of $776.3 million for the quarter, surpassing the anticipated $761.31 million. Adjusted earnings for Q4 were reported at 86 cents per share, exceeding analyst predictions of 85 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 9% year-over-year increase, with subscription revenue up 9% to $757.8 million and Professional services and other revenue up 11% to $18.5 million. Billings for the quarter totaled $923.2 million, reflecting an 11% increase compared to the previous year. Additional details can be found on the Benzinga.com website.

news.headline: Blink Charging Co. (NASDAQ: BLNK) reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results. March 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Bowie, MD on March 13, 2025, Blink Charging Co. (NASDAQ: BLNK) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Blink, a prominent entity in the electric vehicle (EV) domain, operates as an owner, operator, provider, and manufacturer of EV charging tools and services on a global scale.

news.headline: Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) and Interpublic (NYSE: IPG) received a Second Request from FTC in connection with a transaction.
news.summary: Today, in New York City, Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) and Interpublic (NYSE: IPG) disclosed that both companies have been issued a Second Request by the U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC). This request pertains to additional information and documentary material in regards to the current proceedings.

news.headline: S&P 500 drops over 10% from peak amid concerns as stock market reacts to Trump, signaling potential downturn.
news.summary: With the S&P 500 index currently recording a decrease of over 10% from its previous all-time high, investors are closely monitoring the situation for signs of a potential intensifying sell-off.

news.headline: FutureFuel delays release of 2024 financial results due to completion of procedures with accounting firm. An intended date will be announced soon.
news.summary: FutureFuel Corp. (NYSE: FF) based in Clayton, Missouri, has postponed its financial and operating results announcement for the fourth quarter and year that ended on December 31, 2024. The delay is due to ongoing procedures being finalized by FutureFuel and its independent registered public accounting firm. The Company plans to release a new date for reporting these results once the necessary procedures are finished.

news.headline: Stampede Drilling Inc. announces 2024 annual and fourth quarter results, highlighting $20.4M Q4 revenue (5% decrease) and $82.1M 2024 revenue (5% decrease). Net income $687 for Q4 (79% decrease) and $5.2M 2024 (51% decrease). Adjusted EBITDA $4M for Q4 (37% decrease) and $17.5M 2024 (15% decrease). Free cash flow $1.8M for Q4 (67% decrease) and $9.4M 2024 (17% decrease). Stampede repurchased 4,017 common shares in Q4 ($0.19/share) and 11,017 shares in 2024 ($0.21/share). Capital expenditures were $1.7M in Q4 and $14.6M 2024. Drilling rigs utilization was at 46% in Q4 and 43% in 2024. Stampede expects modest growth in oilfield activity in Canada despite global energy challenges. Stampede ended 2024 with a debt to EBITDA ratio of 1.09x and has repurchased 27,816 common shares since the inception of NCIB program. Stampede operates in Western Canada with shares trading on TSXV under "SDI".
news.summary: Stampede Drilling Inc. reported its financial and operational results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, the company had revenue of $20.4 million, a 5% decrease from 2023, with a net income of $687, down 79% from the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA was $3.98 million, a 37% decrease from Q4 2023, and free cash flow was $1.78 million, a 67% decrease. For the full year 2024, revenue was $82.1 million, a 5% decrease from 2023, while net income was $5.16 million, down 51%. Adjusted EBITDA for the year was $17.48 million, a 15% decrease, and free cash flow was $9.43 million, down 17%. Stampede repurchased and cancelled 11,017 common shares in 2024, totaling $2.41 million. Additionally, the company had 14 out of its 19 rigs operational in Q1 2025. Stampede expects modest growth in oilfield activity in Canada and ended 2024 with a debt to EBITDA ratio of 1.09x. Stampede continues to manage debt prudently and has returned $6.43 million to shareholders through share repurchases since August 2023. Stampede operates in Western Canada and trades on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol "SDI".

news.headline: Approval given for Golar LNG Limited's $500 million unsecured Norwegian bond; Oslo Stock Exchange listing planned.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, the Norwegian Financial Supervisory Authority authorized the prospectus created by Golar LNG Limited for the listing application on the Oslo Stock Exchange of the bond with ISIN NO0013331223.

news.headline: EQT to acquire Crown Castle's Small Cells Solutions business, expanding infrastructure platform for cellular carriers.
news.summary: Crown Castle's Small Cells Solutions division constructs and manages small cells across the country to meet the increasing demand for mobile network capacity by cellular providers. The recent transaction underscores EQT's proactive ownership strategy as they acquire a robust core infrastructure platform. This platform is focused on a significant market segment, emphasizing stability and attractiveness for investors looking at a substantial growth opportunity.

news.headline: Intel names new CEO, FTC investigates Microsoft antitrust case. #TechNews
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 5,000 new cases of COVID-19 were reported in the country, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to more than 150,000. The increase in cases has raised concerns about the effectiveness of current preventative measures and the strain it is putting on the healthcare system. Additionally, it was noted that the death toll has surpassed 2,500, highlighting the severity of the situation. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and restrictions to curb the spread of the virus and avoid further casualties.

news.headline: Faraday Future leases first FF 91 2.0 in New York, represents entry into East Coast market, scheduled delivery end of March.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI), the California-headquartered global intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, shared that Univest Securities, LLC from New York City has leased an FF 91 2.0. This development sets the stage for FF and potential FX models to enter the East Coast market, which is a significant move for the company. Faraday Future is making strides in expanding its presence, with this leasing contract being a key step in that direction.

news.headline: PLBY Group reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, aiming for growth and profitability in 2025 with an asset-light model.
news.summary: In the year 2025, the company is positioned for expansion and financial success using an asset-light business model.

news.headline: Pagaya closes $500M AAA-rated consumer loan ABS deal, raised $27B in total, leading issuer of personal loans.
news.summary: Pagaya Technologies LTD. revealed the completion of a $500 million AAA-rated personal loan ABS transaction (PAID 2025-2) on the NASDAQ stock exchange. The global technology company has amassed a total of $27 billion through 67 ABS transactions since 2018 to support loan originations for various products like personal loan and auto. Pagaya is recognized as the leading ABS issuer of personal loans.

news.headline: Western Digital to redeem $1.8B of 4.75% Senior Notes due 2026 on April 14, 2025, at 100% principal amount.
news.summary: Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC) based in San Jose, California, has disclosed plans to redeem $1.8 billion in aggregate principal amount of its 4.750% Senior Notes due in 2026. This redemption is scheduled for April 14, 2025, and the Notes will be repurchased at a price equivalent to 100% of the principal sum being redeemed, in addition to any relevant premium, along with accrued and unpaid interest, if applicable.

news.headline: O'Reilly Automotive approves 15-for-1 stock split pending shareholder approval, increasing authorized shares.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. disclosed a significant development wherein its Board of Directors sanctioned a 15-for-1 split of its common stock, to be executed through a special stock dividend. O’Reilly, a prominent player in the automotive aftermarket sector and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ORLY, made this decision in efforts to enhance shareholder value and possibly broaden accessibility for investors. This move indicates an initiative to make the company’s stock more affordable and potentially attractive to a wider range of potential shareholders.

news.headline: NAYA to implement a 1:12 reverse stock split on March 18, 2025; stock to trade under same symbol "NAYA" on Nasdaq post-split.
news.summary: NAYA Biosciences, Inc., a life science company focusing on oncology, autoimmune diseases, women’s health, IVF, and IVC fertility treatments, disclosed a 1-for-12 reverse split of its common stock. The move, effective March 18, 2025, means current shares will reduce to 1 for every 12 held. Trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market, with the symbol "NAYA," will reflect this change starting March 18, 2025.

news.headline: US to place more sanctions on Russian oil, gas and banking - CBS.
W. P. Carey raises quarterly dividend to $0.890 per share ($3.56 annualized), payable April 15, 2025.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, W. P. Carey Inc. announced an increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.890 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend rate of $3.56 per share. Shareholders of record will receive the dividend on April 15, 2025. W. P. Carey Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WPC.

news.headline: Centerspace (NYSE: CSR) announced Jeff Caira will retire from the board, effective upon committee terms ending.
news.summary: Today, Centerspace (NYSE: CSR) revealed that Jeff Caira, a current Board of Trustees member, is set to retire from his roles as a trustee, chair of the Nominating and Governance Committee, and member of the Audit Committee. This retirement will become effective upon the expiration of a certain date.

news.headline: Kroger declares 32 cent quarterly dividend for shareholders, payable on June 1st to those on record by May 15th.
news.summary: Today, the Board of Directors of The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) announced a quarterly dividend of 32 cents per share. Shareholders of record as of May 15, 2025, will receive the dividend on June 1, 2025. The company's quarterly dividend has shown growth over time.

news.headline: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) authorizes $1 billion share repurchase program to buy KeyCorp common shares.
news.summary: Today in Cleveland, KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) revealed their Board of Directors' approval for a share repurchase initiative. Under this program, KeyCorp is permitted to buy back a maximum of $1.0 billion worth of KeyCorp common shares. This can be done through open market transactions or through privately negotiated deals.

news.headline: TE Connectivity increases quarterly dividend by 9% to $0.71. All 12 board members reelected. Galway, Ireland, March 13, 2025.
news.summary: During the annual general meeting held in GALWAY, Ireland on March 13, 2025, all 12 members of the board of directors of TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) were successfully reelected by the shareholders. In a recent announcement, the company declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.71 per ordinary share to be paid out to its shareholders.

news.headline: FGI Industries (Nasdaq: FGI) to announce Q4 and full-year 2024 results after market close on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: FGI Industries Ltd., a prominent provider of kitchen and bath products, based in East Hanover, N.J., declared that it will release its financial outcomes for Q4 and the entire fiscal year of 2024 post-market closing on March 13, 2025. Traded on Nasdaq as FGI, the Company is anticipated to provide a comprehensive overview of its performance during the specified period.

news.headline: Adecoagro: Strong financials in 2024 with $444M EBITDA, $161M NCFO. Record crushing volume and sugar production. $102M shareholder distribution.
news.summary: Luxembourg, on March 13, 2025 - Today, Adecoagro S.A., a prominent sustainable production company in South America, revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter that concluded on December 31, 2024. The company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AGRO, and can also be found on Bloomberg under AGRO US and on Reuters under AGRO.K. This quarter's report showcases the company's performance over the mentioned period, indicating key figures and outcomes.

news.headline: Columbus McKinnon to present at Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Investor Conference on March 20, 2025, at 1:45 p.m. EST.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Charlotte, North Carolina - Columbus McKinnon Corporation (Nasdaq: CMCO) disclosed its upcoming participation at the Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Investor Conference scheduled for March 20, 2025, at 1:45 p.m. Eastern Time. At this event, the company will present information about their operations to potential investors.

news.headline: ASUR, a leading airport group with operations in Mexico, US, and Colombia, calls for a shareholders' meeting.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Mexico City, Grupo Aeroportuario del Sureste, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: ASR; BMV: ASUR) shared updates. ASUR, a prominent airport group in Mexico, the United States, and Colombia, disclosed details about its General Annual Ordinary Shareholders' meeting.

news.headline: Inspira Technologies (Nasdaq: IINN) notified about minimum bid requirement breach on March 10, 2025. #financialnews
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Ra'anana, Israel, Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. (Nasdaq: IINN), a leading company in life-support and diagnostic technologies, disclosed receiving a written notice on March 10, 2025.

news.headline: MSC Industrial Supply Co. will webcast review of Q2 fiscal 2025 results. Premier distributor of metalworking products.
news.summary: In Melville, N.Y. and Davidson, N.C., on March 13, 2025, MSC Industrial Supply Co. (NYSE: MSM), a leading distributor of Metalworking and Maintenance, Repair and Operations (MRO) products in North America, disclosed significant news.

news.headline: Northwest Pipe Company to attend Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on March 19. Executives will participate. CEO: Scott Montross, CFO: Aaron Wilkins.
news.summary: A prominent manufacturer of water-related infrastructure products, Northwest Pipe Company (NASDAQ: NWPX), based in Vancouver, Washington, revealed on March 13, 2025, that the President and CEO Scott Montross, alongside the CFO Aaron Wilkins, will engage in upcoming events.

news.headline: Nutrien releases 2024 Sustainability Report, available on its website providing company performance and sustainability updates.
news.summary: In Saskatchewan, Nutrien Ltd. (TSX and NYSE: NTR) has published its 2024 Sustainability Report, showcasing company achievements and outlining sustainability efforts. The report is accessible for review and download from Nutrien's website at https://www.nutrien.com/sustainability/sustainability-highlights. Nutrien is a prominent worldwide supplier of crop products and services.

news.headline: Coeur Mining's CFO to attend 37th Roth Conference on March 17, 2025. An invitation-only event for investors.
news.summary: Coeur Mining, Inc.’s Senior VP and CFO, Thomas S. Whelan, is set to take part in the 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17, 2025. The conference is by invitation only. Interested parties can access presentation materials on the Company’s website at www.coeur.com. Coeur Mining, Inc., listed on the NYSE as CDE, is a US-based precious metals producer that is experiencing growth and diversification.

news.headline: Nokia Corp to buy back own shares on March 13, 2025.
US Secretary of State Rubio: Trump will never allow Iran to have a "base" in the Americas.

Cryptocurrency prices decline, only XRP shows slight gains. Notable drops in large transactions, daily active addresses. Over $209 million liquidated, 36,000 BTC withdrawn in last 96 hrs. Trump family in talks for stake in Binance, crypto experts predict $60,000 floor if downtrend continues.
news.summary: Cryptocurrencies experienced bearish trends on Thursday, with XRP being the only one showing strength. Bitcoin dropped 3% to $80,353.45, Ethereum fell 1.5% to $1,852.08, Solana declined 2.4% to $121.79, XRP rose 0.4% to $2.24, Dogecoin dipped 3.7% to $0.1631, and Shiba Inu was down 2.9% to $0.00001190. IntoTheBlock data showed decreases in large transaction volume by 10.7%, daily active addresses by 5%, and transactions over $100,000. Coinglass reported that 81,934 traders were liquidated for $209.56 million in the last 24 hours, while analyst Ali Martinez noted over 36,000 BTC withdrawn from exchanges in 96 hours. Notable developments include talks of the Trump family acquiring a stake in Binance and predictions of BTC, ETH, and XRP possibly reaching a $60,000 floor if the downtrend continues. Binance CEO Richard Teng praised Donald Trump's Bitcoin reserve.

news.headline: Ribbon Acquisition Corp allows separate trading of 5,000,000 IPO units w/ ordinary shares & rights, trading began March 7 on Nasdaq. Contact Odyssey Trust to separate units.
news.summary: Ribbon Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: RIBBU) recently stated that holders of the 5,000,000 units from its initial public offering now have the option to trade the ordinary shares and rights separately, starting from March 7, 2025. Should the units remain combined, they will keep trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "RIBBU." The separated ordinary shares and rights are anticipated to be traded on the Nasdaq as "RIBB" and "RIBBR," respectively. Unitholders must get in touch with Odyssey Trust Company, the Company's transfer agent, through their brokers to split the units into ordinary shares and rights.

news.headline: M-tron Industries, Inc. will present at Sidoti Small-Cap Virtual Conference on March 20, 2025. CEO and team to meet investors.
news.summary: M-tron Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: MPTI) revealed that Cameron Pforr, the Interim CEO, alongside other company executives, are set to participate in the Sidoti Small-Cap Virtual Conference on March 19-20, 2025. This event will offer opportunities for investors to engage in one-on-one meetings with Mtron management. The conference will showcase presentations from diverse small-cap firms. Mr. Pforr will discuss Mtron’s ongoing initiatives and strategies during the event.

news.headline: Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ: HST) to report first quarter 2025 financial results on April 30 after market close.
news.summary: Bethesda, Maryland – On March 13, 2025, Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, April 30, 2025, following the market closure. As the leading lodging real estate investment trust in the country, the company operates under the NASDAQ symbol HST.

news.headline: Zayo, a DigitalBridge portfolio company, to acquire Crown Castle’s Fiber Solutions Business for $4.25 billion.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG), a prominent digital infrastructure investment firm, revealed that its subsidiary Zayo, acquired with EQT in 2020, has secured a definitive deal to purchase Crown Castle’s Fiber Solutions business. This transaction, valued at around $4.25 billion, aims to enhance Zayo's capacity to provide top-notch connectivity solutions to businesses.

news.headline: DallasNews Corp has sold its Plano, TX North Plant printing facility.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. The number of jobless individuals in the workforce has decreased by over 300,000 compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, the economy has added 450,000 new jobs in various sectors, indicating a positive trend towards recovery. This decline in unemployment is seen as a promising sign for the country's economic growth and stability. Analysts predict that with the current pace, the job market is expected to continue improving in the coming months.

news.headline: Chances of US shutdown rise as Democrats oppose GOP bill.
Culture Pop Soda launches brand campaign celebrating real taste, giving away $1 million worth of soda in next year.
news.summary: Culture Pop Soda has kicked off its brand campaign for 2025, titled "If Soda Grew on Trees", which highlights the authentic and flavorful taste of their products. The campaign emphasizes that if soda were more accessible, everyone would enjoy it. To support this notion, Culture Pop Soda has pledged to distribute soda valued at 1 million dollars throughout the next year as a part of their initiative.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Rubio: We believe the agreement between the US and Panama regarding Panama Canal has been violated.
US Secretary of State Rubio: Panama President Mulino has taken concrete steps, distancing country from China.
Hoskinson Family Office invests $1.5M in W3i Software, Inc. for Cardano's regulated DeFi growth. Leading to new stablecoin.
news.summary: In a recent development, the Hoskinson Family Office, Inc. (HFO) based in West Lafayette, Indiana, has injected $1.5 million into W3i Software, Inc. This firm is renowned as the creator of USDM, which happens to be Cardano's initial MiCA-compliant stablecoin, backed by fiat. This substantial investment signifies a crucial move towards linking decentralized finance (DeFi) and the regulated financial sector, thereby enhancing the worldwide acceptance of Cardano. USDM, established by Moneta Digital, stands out as one of the few stablecoins that adhere to stringent regulatory guidelines.

news.headline: Veritone reported Q4 2024 results, strong topline performance, entering 2025 with momentum. Ryan Steelberg optimistic.
news.summary: Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), a prominent company known for its innovative AI solutions centered around human interface, recently disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company's top-line performance in Q4 of 2024 was commendable, highlighting the promising commencement of 2025. Veritone's Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer, Ryan Steelberg, expressed optimism about the future citing the success of their cutting-edge Veritone Data Refinery offering. The company is particularly focused on augmenting growth within the Public Sector segment, reflecting a positive outlook for further expansion.

news.headline: Benson & Bingham wins $30M settlement in landmark premises liability case in Las Vegas, led by Joseph L. Benson II, Esq.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 13, 2025, Benson & Bingham Accident Injury Lawyers achieved a favorable resolution in a premises liability case amounting to $30 million. Joseph L. Benson II, Esq. spearheaded the case, showcasing the firm's commitment to advocating for injury victims and ensuring accountability for negligent property owners.
